messages.content: # Here is how to fix AC\flames.cpp error.

# __**Step 1:**__
> Navigate to your <#1322235675239645184> 
> Then open the "Content" folder, then the "cars" folder.

# __**Step 2:**__
> Open a different NoHesi car folder, let’s say the No Hesi Lexus LFA car file for example.

# __**Step 3:**__
> Copy the "texture" folder inside of the LFA folder

> After you copy that "texture" folder
> Find the MK4 Supra folder

> Paste the "texture" folder into the MK4 folder

> Then close everything and restart your game and the error should stop
